title: Flowise whitelists /api/v1/nvidia-nim, leaving privileged NIM endpoints unauthenticated
description: packages/server/src/utils/constants.ts defines WHITELIST_URLS, the list of route prefixes the global authentication middleware skips. The entry '/api/v1/nvidia-nim' (line 27 at this commit) causes all NVIDIA NIM controller endpoints (/get-token, /pull-image, /start-container, /stop-container, /list-running-containers, etc.) to bypass JWT/API-key validation, and none of those controllers perform their own auth check. An unauthenticated attacker can therefore retrieve a valid NVIDIA API token and manage Docker/NIM containers (start/stop/pull arbitrary images).
